column1: # Phase 11 — Alt-F2 STEP mode. With STEP on, a running macro
# pauses before each action; Space advances one step; Esc aborts.
# Macro at A1: writes A:E1=1, A:E2=2, A:E3=3 then quits.
# Toggle STEP mode on. STEP indicator appears.
# Fire the macro. Without Space presses it must NOT have written
# any cells yet — the first action is parked.
# Advance one step → {LET E1, 1} fires. E1 now has 1; we re-pause.
# Abort with Esc. The remaining {LET}s never run; E2 still empty.
# Toggle STEP off so the next macro run completes normally.
